context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Container for seeds, player interaction target for feeding
context.usage_scenario: Player taps bowl to fill with seeds. Bowl has 3 visual states: Full (2), Low (1), Empty (0). Depletes over 30 minutes per level. Echo eats from this when fed.

visual_specification.shape: Simple bowl viewed from above, oval/circular top view

animation.description: 3 separate states, not animated. State changes based on food_level variable: 0=Empty, 1=Low, 2=Full.

visual_specification.details: State 0 (Empty): Brown bowl outline only, hollow interior. State 1 (Low): 3-4 seed pixels (3x3px #FFA300) scattered in bowl. State 2 (Full): 6-8 seed pixels filling bowl interior. Bowl shape: oval 16px wide, 12px tall. Seeds are irregular 3x3px golden dots.

relationships.shared_with: Brown color with perch and Echo's beak
relationships.differences_from: water_bowl: larger vs smaller, seeds vs water, brown vs blue interior. Seed: container vs content.

explicit_negations: Bowl does not tip or move
Seeds do not animate or bounce
No shine or reflection on bowl
No gradual depletion animation (instant state change)
No cracks or wear on bowl
Seeds do not overflow bowl edges
